title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 371.220 - Corporate income exempt from income tax
text:
371.220.  Corporate income exempt from income tax. — All income received by a development finance corporation is exempt from the taxes imposed on incomes by this state; but this exemption does not apply to income received by stockholders of the development finance corporation in the form of dividends or otherwise.
(L. 1961 p. 157 § 20)
